case_title: CRISTOBAL MARTINEZ VS. RICHARD MANFREDONIA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, CRISTOBAL AS TO DEFENDANT MANFREDONIA, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ON-SOTE MAINTENANCE AKA OSM; ON-SITE REFINISHING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MANFREDONIA, RICHARD EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF ON-SITE REFINISHING LEE, RICKY(RICHARD) IPPOLITO EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL OF ON-SITE REFINISHING WSM ENTERPRISES, INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, CRISTOBAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANFREDONIA, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ON-SOTE MAINTENANCE AKA OSM; ON-SITE REFINISHING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MANFREDONIA, RICHARD EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF ON-SITE REFINISHING LEE, RICKY(RICHARD) IPPOLITO EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL OF ON-SITE REFINISHING WSM ENTERPRISES, INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $4,690.49 PRINCIPAL, $11.61 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,855.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
FILING FEE FILED BY CRISTOBAL MARTINEZ
